Custom Photo Tiles for Wall Art & Interior Design

Premium Photo Tile Printing with Multiple Mounting Options & Damage-Free Installation

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Photo Tile Size Selection Upload Your Photo Choose Mounting Option Select Production Time Add Special Instructions PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Photo Tiles with Repositionable Adhesive for Interior Wall Display

Transform your favorite photos into premium custom photo tiles designed for versatile wall display. StikPics photo tiles feature damage-free mounting options that allow you to create stunning wall art without nails, screws, or wall damage. Perfect for renters, homeowners, and interior designers who want flexible photo display solutions.

Each custom photo tile is printed on premium polystyrene foam board with three mounting options: repositionable adhesive for easy repositioning, permanent adhesive for textured surfaces, and traditional picture hangers for existing wall hardware. Create personalized wall galleries, accent walls, or temporary displays with professional-quality photo tiles.

Key Features for Photo Tile Installation

  • Damage-free repositionable adhesive mounting
  • Premium polystyrene foam board construction
  • Scratch, warp, and moisture resistant finish
  • Multiple mounting options for any surface
  • High-resolution printing for sharp photo quality
  • Custom sizes available for any space
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Premium Polystyrene Material for Photo Tile Durability & Moisture Resistance

StikPics photo tiles are manufactured using premium polystyrene foam board, also known as Gator Board, specifically chosen for interior wall display applications. This professional-grade material provides superior durability and longevity for your custom photo tiles.

Material Construction Benefits

  • Scratch Resistant Surface: Maintains photo quality and appearance over time
  • Warp Resistance: Stays flat against walls without curling or bending
  • Moisture Resistant: Suitable for bathrooms, kitchens, and humid environments
  • Reinforced Core: Melamine and wood fiber veneer provide structural strength
  • Lightweight Design: Easy to handle and mount without heavy-duty hardware

The polystyrene foam board construction ensures your photo tiles maintain their shape and appearance in various indoor environments while providing a stable printing surface for vibrant, long-lasting photo reproduction.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Tile Mounting Options for Wall Installation & Surface Compatibility

Every StikPics photo tile includes three mounting options to ensure compatibility with your specific wall surface and installation preferences. Choose the mounting method that best fits your space and display requirements.

Repositionable Adhesive Mounting

Perfect for smooth, clean surfaces like drywall, painted walls, and glass. This damage-free adhesive allows you to reposition your photo tiles multiple times without leaving residue or damaging wall surfaces. Ideal for renters and temporary displays.

Permanent Adhesive Mounting

Designed for textured surfaces including brick, concrete, wood paneling, and rough-textured walls. Provides a secure, long-lasting hold on challenging surfaces where repositionable adhesive may not adhere properly.

Picture Hanger Mounting

Traditional hanging method that works with existing nails, screws, or picture hanging systems. Perfect for customers who prefer conventional mounting methods or need to match existing gallery wall installations.

Surface Compatibility Guide

  • Smooth Surfaces: Repositionable adhesive recommended
  • Textured Surfaces: Permanent adhesive or picture hanger options
  • Rental Properties: Repositionable adhesive for damage-free removal
  • Gallery Walls: Picture hanger for consistent alignment
PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Photo Tile Production Times & Express Printing Services

Choose from flexible production timeframes ranging from 1 to 5 business days to match your project timeline. All production times begin after file upload completion and order approval.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Express turnaround for urgent photo tile projects. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day. Same-day rush services available in select cases through customer service.

2 Business Days Express Production

Fast turnaround for time-sensitive installations while maintaining quality standards. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Most popular production option providing excellent turnaround speed at no additional charge. Ideal for most custom photo tile projects with moderate timing requirements.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Cost-effective option for projects without urgent deadlines. Reduced pricing while maintaining the same high-quality printing and materials.

Production Timeline Notes

  • Production time excludes shipping duration
  • Timeline begins after complete file upload
  • Proof requests pause production until approval
  • Prepress review may extend timeline if artwork requires adjustment
  • Rush services available through customer service consultation
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Tile Payment Options & Order Processing

All custom photo tiles require payment before production begins to ensure order accuracy and timely processing. Multiple payment methods accommodate various customer preferences and business requirements.

Accepted Credit Cards

  • Visa
  • MasterCard
  • American Express
  • Discover

Check Payments

Personal and business checks accepted with processing hold until check clearance. Check payments must be received and cleared before photo tile production begins. Contact customer service for check payment processing timelines.

Payment Processing Timeline

  • Credit cards charged only after order approval
  • Payment authorization required before production
  • Check clearance required before processing
  • Production begins immediately after payment confirmation

Payment security is maintained through encrypted processing systems to protect customer financial information throughout the ordering process.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Photo Tile Delivery

Custom photo tiles ship via UPS Ground unless alternative shipping methods are requested during ordering. Ground shipping reaches 90% of the United States within 1-3 business days from our production facility.

Standard Shipping Process

  • UPS Ground shipping included with all orders
  • Tracking number provided once shipped
  • 1-3 day delivery to most US locations
  • Shipping cost calculated by weight and destination
  • Large orders may incur additional shipping charges

Shipping Timeline Considerations

Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping duration. Production timeline begins after file upload completion, while shipping time varies by destination and selected production speed.

Package Protection & Tracking

  • Professional packaging protects photo tiles during transit
  • UPS tracking available for delivery monitoring
  • Delivery confirmation provided upon arrival
  • Carrier terms apply for lost or delayed packages

For shipping questions or special delivery requirements, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order to discuss available options and pricing.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Interior Design Uses for Custom Photo Tiles

Custom photo tiles provide versatile wall art solutions for residential and commercial interior design projects. The damage-free mounting system makes photo tiles ideal for various applications and temporary installations.

Residential Interior Applications

  • Gallery Walls: Create cohesive photo displays with uniform mounting
  • Bedroom Decor: Personal photo collections and family portraits
  • Living Room Accent Walls: Large format photo installations
  • Kitchen Backsplashes: Moisture-resistant food photography and family photos
  • Bathroom Decor: Humidity-resistant photo displays
  • Children's Rooms: Repositionable photo tiles for changing preferences

Commercial Interior Design

  • Office Spaces: Corporate photography and brand imagery
  • Retail Displays: Product photography and promotional images
  • Restaurant Decor: Food photography and ambiance imagery
  • Medical Offices: Calming nature photography and artwork
  • Hotel Rooms: Local photography and branded imagery

Rental Property Solutions

Repositionable adhesive mounting makes photo tiles perfect for rental properties, dorm rooms, and temporary living situations where wall damage must be avoided. Remove and reposition without residue or surface damage.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Tile Artwork Requirements & File Specifications

High-resolution printing capabilities ensure professional-quality results for your custom photo tiles. Following artwork guidelines maximizes print quality and color accuracy.

Recommended File Specifications

  • Minimum Resolution: 800 x 800 pixels for standard sizes
  • Optimal Resolution: 300 DPI at final print size
  • File Formats: JPEG, PNG, PDF, TIFF
  • Color Mode: RGB for digital photos
  • File Size: No maximum limit for high-quality uploads

Image Quality Guidelines

Higher resolution images produce sharper, more detailed photo tiles. Images below 800 pixels may appear pixelated when printed, especially on larger sizes. Professional photographers and high-resolution smartphone cameras typically provide suitable image quality.

Professional Design Services

Unsure about image quality or need design assistance? Our graphic designers provide file evaluation and enhancement services to ensure optimal printing results for your photo tiles.

Order Proof Options

Request order proofs to review artwork placement, sizing, and order details before production begins. Proofs include low-resolution artwork preview, complete order summary, pricing confirmation, and billing information verification. Production holds until proof approval is received.

File upload process accommodates large, high-resolution images to maintain maximum print quality throughout the production process.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Photo Tiles Online Today

Transform your favorite photos into professional-quality wall art with StikPics custom photo tiles. Our streamlined online ordering process makes it easy to create personalized photo displays for any interior space.

Simple Online Ordering Process

  1. Select Size & Quantity: Choose photo tile dimensions and quantity for your project
  2. Upload Your Photos: Drag and drop high-resolution images directly from your device
  3. Choose Mounting Option: Select repositionable, permanent, or picture hanger mounting
  4. Select Production Time: Choose from 1-5 business day production options
  5. Review & Approve: Confirm artwork, sizing, and order details before production

Professional Design Support Available

Need help with image sizing, color correction, or design layout? Our professional graphic designers provide complimentary consultation to ensure your photo tiles exceed expectations. Upload your images and include design instructions during checkout.

Quality Guarantee & Customer Support

Every photo tile is produced using premium materials and high-resolution printing technology. Our customer service team is available Monday-Friday 8AM-4PM CST at (320) 391-5300 for ordering assistance, design consultation, and technical support.

Ready to create your custom photo tiles? Upload your photos and start designing your personalized wall art today. With damage-free mounting options and professional-quality printing, your memories will look stunning on any wall surface.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Tile Printing FAQ

Can I reposition photo tiles after installation?

Yes, photo tiles with repositionable adhesive can be moved and repositioned multiple times without damaging wall surfaces or leaving residue. This makes them perfect for rental properties and changing design preferences.

What wall surfaces work with photo tile mounting?

Photo tiles adhere to most wall surfaces. Repositionable adhesive works best on smooth surfaces like drywall and painted walls. Permanent adhesive is recommended for textured surfaces like brick, concrete, or wood paneling. Picture hangers work with any surface that supports traditional hanging hardware.

How large can I print my photo tiles?

Custom sizing is available to accommodate various project requirements. Contact customer service for large format printing options and pricing for oversized photo tile installations.

Will photo tiles damage my walls?

Repositionable adhesive mounting is designed to remove cleanly without wall damage or residue. Permanent adhesive creates a stronger bond and may not remove as cleanly. Picture hanger mounting uses existing wall hardware without additional wall contact.

What image resolution do I need for quality printing?

Minimum 800 x 800 pixels for standard sizes, with 300 DPI at final print size recommended for optimal quality. Higher resolution images produce sharper, more detailed results. Our design team can evaluate your images if you're unsure about quality.

How long do photo tiles last?

Premium polystyrene construction with scratch, warp, and moisture resistance ensures long-term durability. High-resolution printing maintains color quality over time when displayed indoors away from direct sunlight.

Can I order photo tiles in different shapes?

Standard rectangular and square formats are available through online ordering. Contact customer service for custom shape options and specialty cutting requirements.

Do you offer bulk pricing for multiple photo tiles?

Quantity discounts are available for large orders. Upload multiple images during checkout or contact customer service for bulk pricing on commercial projects and large installations.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
